word: G5145 - τριακόσιοι - triakósioi - tree-ak-os'-ee-oy - Three hundred

sections.paragraph:
- Original: τριακόσιοι

- Transliteration: Triakosioi

- Phonetic: tree-ak-os'-ee-oy

- Definition:

1. three hundred

- Origin: plural from G5140 and G1540

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: Plural from G5140 and G1540; three hundred: - three hundred.
